sections.title: Before delivering any balls of wool

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many more do I need to give you?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You need to collect 20 more balls of wool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't got any at the moment.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Ah well at least you haven't been eaten. You know what you're doing, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I shear sheep, again?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well, you're half way there already! You have a set of shears in your inventory. Just use those on a Sheep to shear it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all I have to do?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well once you've collected some wool you'll need to spin it into balls.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well, first things first, you need a pair of shears. I've got some here you can use.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You just need to go and use them on the sheep out in my field.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: That's what they all say!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Some of the sheep don't like it too much... Persistence is the key.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Once you've collected some wool you can spin it into balls.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Do you know how to spin wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know how to spin wool.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know how to spin wool, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Remind me how to spin wool.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: The nearest Spinning Wheel can be found on the first floor of Lumbridge Castle.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: To get to Lumbridge Castle just follow the road east.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I think so.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You can get to it, then!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How many more do I need to give you?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You need to collect 20 more balls of wool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got some wool. I've not managed to make it into a ball though.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well go find a spinning wheel then. You can find one on the first floor of Lumbridge Castle, just walk east on the road outside my house and you'll find Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land? You're not the one who keeps leaving all my gates open and letting out all my sheep, are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a quest.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You're after a quest, you say? Well I don't have any here.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You're after a quest, you say? Actually, I could do with a bit of help.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: My sheep are getting mighty woolly. I'd be much obliged if you could shear them. And while you're at it, spin the wool for me too.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Yes, that's it. Bring me 20 balls of wool. And I'm sure I could sort out some sort of payment. Of course, there's the small matter of The Thing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In fact Fred, funnily enough, I actually have 20 balls of wool already on me.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Have you been shearing my sheep without permission!?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No! Well, maybe... They just looked a little wooly! Surely you like a shave once in a while, too?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: It's rude to shave another person without permission - don't be coming at me with them shears!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I'll ask permission next time.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: I guess no real 'arm was done. Hand the balls over and we can put this whole thing behind us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean, The Thing?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well now, no one has ever seen The Thing. That's why we call it The Thing, 'cos we don't know what it is.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Some say it's a black hearted shapeshifter, hungering for the souls of hard working decent folk like me. Others say it's just a sheep.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well I don't have all day to stand around and gossip. Are you going to shear my sheep or what!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, okay. I can do that.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Good! Now one more thing, do you actually know how to shear a sheep?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err. No, I don't know actually.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well, first things first, you need a pair of shears. I've got some here you can use.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You just need to go and use them on the sheep out in my field.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds easy!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: That's what they all say!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Some of the sheep don't like it too much... Persistence is the key.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Once you've collected some wool you can spin it into balls.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Do you know how to spin wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know how to spin wool, sorry.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Don't worry, it's quite simple!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: The nearest Spinning Wheel can be found on the first floor of Lumbridge Castle.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: To get to Lumbridge Castle just follow the road east.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll give it a miss.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Suit yourself.

sections.title: Handing in any balls of wool

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Give 'em here then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all I've got so far.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: I need [1-19] more before I can pay you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok I'll work on it.

sections.title: After interacting with the The Thing

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Give 'em here then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's all I've got so far.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: I need [#] more before I can pay you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok I'll work on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fred! Fred! I've seen The Thing!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: You ... you actually saw it?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Run for the hills! [player name] grab as many chickens as you can! We have to ...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fred!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: ... flee! Oh, woe is me! The shapeshifter is coming! We're all ...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: FRED!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: ... doomed. What!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not a shapeshifter or any other kind of monster!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Well then what is it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well ... it's just two Penguins; Penguins disguised as a sheep.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Have you been out in the sun too long?

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: What are you doing on my land?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to talk to you about shearing these sheep!

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Oh. How are you doing getting those balls of wool?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have some.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: Give 'em here then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's the last of them.

lines.speaker: Fred the Farmer
lines.text: I guess I'd better pay you then.
